## Code status

Complete for use in GPS study as of 10/2024.

## Notes

Generates auROC plot.

## Set Up


### Study parameters


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
study <- params$study
cv <- params$cv
algorithms <- params$algorithms
version <- params$version
```
:::

### Absolute paths


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
path_models <- format_path(str_c("studydata/risk/models/", study))
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
probs <- 
  read_rds(here::here(path_models, str_c("inner_preds_", version, "_", cv, ".rds"))) |> 
  glimpse()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

:::




## Plots



::: {#cell-fig-auroc .cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| label: fig-auroc
#| fig-cap: "auROC Plot"
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 3

tpfp_data <- probs |> 
  roc_curve(prob_raw, truth = label)
  
tpfp_data |>
  mutate(tp = round(sensitivity, 4),
         fp = round(1 - specificity, 4)) |>
  group_by(tp, fp) |> 
  summarise(.threshold = mean(.threshold)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fp, y = tp, color = .threshold)) +
  geom_path(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_abline(lty = 3) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "False Positive Rate",
       y = "True Positive Rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0,1,.25)) +
  scale_color_gradient(low="blue", high = "red")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
`summarise()` has grouped output by 'tp'. You can override using the `.groups`
argument.
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![auROC Plot](auROC_plot_files/figure-html/fig-auroc-1.png){#fig-auroc width=480}
:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
aurocs <- probs |> 
  group_by(inner_split_num, outer_split_num) |> 
  summarize(auroc = roc_auc_vec(truth = label, estimate = prob_raw))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
`summarise()` has grouped output by 'inner_split_num'. You can override using
the `.groups` argument.
```


:::
:::



histogram of aurocs


::: {#cell-fig-auroc_hist .cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| label: fig-auroc_hist
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of auROCs across 300 inner folds"
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 3

aurocs |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = auroc)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "#97C4C5") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median(aurocs$auroc), linetype = "dashed", color = "red")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
`stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Distribution of auROCs across 300 inner folds](auROC_plot_files/figure-html/fig-auroc_hist-1.png){#fig-auroc_hist width=480}
:::
:::



## Posterior Distribution



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
if (file.exists("objects/pp_auroc.rds")){
  pp <- read_rds("objects/pp_auroc.rds")
} else{
  pp <- auroc |> 
    select(outer_split_num, inner_split_num, auroc) |> 
    rename(id = outer_split_num,
           id2 = inner_split_num) |> 
    perf_mod(formula = statistic ~ 1 + (1 | id/id2),
             # prior_intercept = rstanarm::student_t(autoscale = TRUE),
             # prior = rstanarm::student_t(autoscale = TRUE),
             # transform = tidyposterior::logit_trans,  # for skewed & bounded AUC
             iter = 13000, chains = 4,
             adapt_delta = .99999999,
             # cores = 4, seed = 12345,
             family = gaussian)
  
  pp |> 
    write_rds("objects/pp_auroc.rds")
}
```
:::

::: {#cell-fig-auroc_posterior .cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| label: fig-auroc_posterior
#| fig-cap: "Posterior Distribution of auROC scores"
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 3

pp_tidy <- pp |> 
  tidy(seed = 123)

ci <- pp_tidy |> 
  summary() |> 
  mutate(y = 30)

# vertical line for the median
pp_tidy |> 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_density(aes(x = posterior), color = c("#80B1D3"), 
               fill = c("#B3CFE8"), linewidth = .8, alpha = .6) +
  geom_errorbar(data = ci, aes(y = y, xmin = lower, xmax = upper), 
                linewidth = .6, width = 2, color = c("#4292C6")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median(pp_tidy$posterior), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  ylab("Posterior Probability Density") +
  xlab("Area Under ROC Curve")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Posterior Distribution of auROC scores](auROC_plot_files/figure-html/fig-auroc_posterior-1.png){#fig-auroc_posterior width=480}
:::
:::
